---
title: "Labour Market Data"
format: html
---

## Labour Market Data

This section will include interactive visual tools based on TÜİK labour market statistics.

### Planned tools

- Labour force participation rates
- Employment rates
- Unemployment rates
- Female, male, and total comparisons
- Year-based dynamic filtering

::: {=html}
<div class="tool-note">
First interactive tool coming soon: <strong>Labour Market Trends Explorer</strong>
</div>
:::
